creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
webkit-gtk2 builds in $HOME or at least /root, which is illegal.  It will fail to build in poudriere if tests are requested.

gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/webkit-gtk2/work/webkit-1.8
===========================================================================
====>> Checking for filesystem violations... done
====>> Error: Filesystem touched during build:
extra: root/.local
===>  Cleaning for webkit-gtk2-1.8.3_3
build of /usr/ports/www/webkit-gtk2 ended at Fri Jun 20 21:29:58 CEST 2014
build time: 00:19:49
